data.content: Plan review approved: the proposed change correctly targets SearchableOptionCombobox in settings-agents-scanned.tsx, and the custom cmdk filter is feasible because the local Command wrapper forwards filter props to CommandPrimitive. The plan remains within scope, has no invariant conflicts, addresses the stated substring-matching failure for model/provider fields, and the test strategy covers acceptance via lint, typecheck, tests, and manual verification of case-insensitive partial matches plus clearing the search.
